subtasks.description: Identify publishers with declining spend from Q3 to Q4 2024. Show publishers where Q4 spend is less than Q3 spend.

plan.cost_rationale: Simple task — Haiku classifier, small tier

output.sql: WITH q3_spend AS (SELECT publisher, SUM(amount_usd) as q3_total FROM consumption_facts WHERE event_date >= '2024-07-01' AND event_date <= '2024-09-30' AND fiscal_quarter = 3 GROUP BY publisher), q4_spend AS (SELECT publisher, SUM(amount_usd) as q4_total FROM consumption_facts WHERE event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND event_date <= '2024-12-31' AND fiscal_quarter = 4 GROUP BY publisher) SELECT q3.publisher, q3.q3_total, q4.q4_total, (q4.q4_total - q3.q3_total) as spend_change FROM q3_spend q3 JOIN q4_spend q4 ON q3.publisher = q4.publisher WHERE q4.q4_total < q3.q3_total ORDER BY spend_change ASC
